heading: The Kids Who Inspire Us
subheading: Every room starts with a dream. These are the children who remind us why we do what we do.

kids.name: Mathew
kids.blurb: Our very first makeover — 11-year-old Mathew wanted a military-themed bunker bedroom, and bringing it to life changed everything for us and for him.

kids.name: Adrian
kids.blurb: Adrian dreamed of a space-themed bedroom where he could imagine exploring the stars. His new room gave him a launchpad for his biggest adventures.

kids.name: Tripp
kids.blurb: Tripp's whole-home makeover drew 1.6 million viewers on WSB-TV and showed the world what a little sunshine can do.
